scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,telemetry -c cyan,magenta,yellow "FIX_CI_TELEMETRY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5180 npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev" "npm --prefix services/fix-ci-telemetry run dev"
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix web test
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck && npm --prefix services/fix-ci-telemetry run typecheck
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix services/fix-ci-telemetry install
